sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, product VARCHAR, amount DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO sales (id, product, amount) VALUES (1, 'Product A', 100.0), (2, 'Product B', 150.0), (3, 'Product A', 200.0);
SELECT product, amount, cume_dist() OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY amount) AS cum_dist FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE product = 'Product A';
SELECT id, product, amount, cume_dist() OVER (ORDER BY amount) AS cum_dist FROM sales WHERE amount > 100;
